memoryArtifacts.headline: Simon Manning
memoryArtifacts.description:
BYU Film Number 355556
EGBERT GENEALOGY
Descendants of Egbert Sanderson Collateral Lines A-Z, This genealogy was Collected and organized in 5 volumes by Darrell Dwight Matthews.  Microfilmed May 1963.

zh.London, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Manning於大約1365年出生在英國肯特達哈姆時，他的父親Simon Manning32歲，母親Catherine Chaucer22歲。他於大約1401年與Alice Walden在英國肯特達哈姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1413年在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國肯特達哈姆。

zh-hans.London, London, England: 英国英格兰倫敦聖 巴沙洛繆 白 馮 羅雅爾 艾可昌
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Manning于大约1365年出生在英国肯特達哈姆时，他的父亲Simon Manning32岁，母亲Catherine Chaucer22岁。他于大约1401年与Alice Walden在英国肯特達哈姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1413年在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国肯特達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Manning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Cork and Kerry): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Mainnín ‘descendant of Mainnín’, probably an assimilated form of Mainchín, a diminutive of manach ‘monk’. This is the name of a chieftain family in Connacht. It is sometimes pronounced Ó Maingín and Anglicized as Mangan .
English: from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Manning.
North German and Dutch: habitational name from a farm so named, once in possession of a certain Manno (see Mann 2) and his kin.

variants.name: Mannen
meanings: Altered form of Irish or English   Manning  .

variants.name: Mannion
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Malachy, Brendan, Aislinn, Brigid, Ciaran, Declan, Dermot, Kieran, Liam, Maeve, Siobhan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mainnín (see Manning ).
English and Irish: variant of   Mangan  .

variants.name: Mangan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Ciaran, Declan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mongáin ‘descendant of Mongán’, a byname for someone with a luxuriant head of hair (from mong ‘hair, mane’).

variants.name: Mannings
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Donovan, Eamonn, Ronan.
Irish: variant of Manning 1, with the addition of English excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Manning was born about 1365, in Cudham, Kent, England, his father, Simon Manning, was 32 and his mother, Catherine Chaucer, was 22. He married Alice Walden about 1401, in Cudham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died about 1413, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Cudham, Kent, England.

fr.London, London, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Manning est né environ 1365, à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Simon Manning, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Catherine Chaucer, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Walden environ 1401, à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1413, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre.

de.London, London, England: St Bartholomew by The Royal Exchange, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Manning um 1365 in Cudham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon Manning 32 und seine Mutter Catherine Chaucer 22. Er hat um 1401 in Cudham, Kent, England Alice Walden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1413 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cudham, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Manning è nato il circa 1365 nel Cudham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Simon Manning, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Chaucer, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Walden circa 1401, nel Cudham, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1413, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Cudham, Kent, England.

ja.Cudham, Kent, England: イギリスケントクウドハム
ja.lifeSummary: John Manningが約1365年にイギリスケントクウドハムで生まれた時，父Simon Manningは32歳，母Catherine Chaucerは22歳であった。約1401年にイギリスケントクウドハムでAlice Waldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1413年に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリスケントクウドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.London, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 바토롬w 비 테 로야 스창
ko.lifeSummary: John Manning(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 켄트 c드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon Manning(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Chaucer(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1401년 영국 켄트 c드함에서 Alice Walden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1413년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 c드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Manning nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon Manning, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Chaucer, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Walden aproximadamente 1401, em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1413, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.London, London, England: ст бартоломю би т рояль эксчанг, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Manning родился около 1365 г. в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon Manning было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Chaucer, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Walden около 1401 г. в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1413 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Alice Walden aproximadamente 1401, en Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1413, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra.
